boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: missing confined-space approval.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current confined-space permit and entrant list match

critical_features_preserved: current confined-space permit and entrant list match
final_answer: Action may proceed. Controlling source records confirm the confined-space permit and entrant list match exactly. The action boundary is closed with no defects. Policy permits execution when current sources close the boundary.
